disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unilateral posterior scrotal pain and swelling that came on gradually over three days
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and swelling?
Did this come on suddenly or build up over days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's the back of my right testicle — swollen, hot and really tender. It built up over about three days, it didn't hit all at once.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning on urination, urinary urgency and frequency
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt or burn when you pass urine?
Are you needing to pass urine more often or more urgently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, it stings and burns when I pee, and I keep needing to go urgently and more often than normal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mucopurulent urethral discharge noticed on underwear
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any discharge from the tip of the penis or a stain on your underwear?
Any fluid or pus coming from the urethra?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, there was a yellowish discharge stain on my underwear this morning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low-grade fever and mild systemic malaise
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or felt generally unwell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt a bit off and warm — my home thermometer said 37.8. No proper shaking chills though.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Whether the onset was sudden and agonising (torsion-type screen) — here it was gradual, not sudden
trigger_question_examples: Did the pain start extremely suddenly, like a switch, and was it instantly agonising?
Any nausea or vomiting with the pain, or did you wake from sleep with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it wasn't a sudden switch — it built up over a few days and got steadily worse. I didn't vomit or wake up screaming with it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sexual activity relevant to sexually transmitted infection risk
trigger_question_examples: Are you sexually active, and could I ask a few questions about that to help work out the cause?
Any new or multiple partners recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I'm sexually active. I'd rather not go into detail but I understand it might be relevant.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: Do we really need to get into my sex life? It's just a swollen testicle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked functional impairment — antalgic wide-based gait from scrotal weight and pain
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting your ability to move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm shuffling with my legs apart and going really slowly — walking pulls on it and it kills.
